creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: I'd suggest we dump the GHC altogether and convert those few ports to simple MASTER_SITES=https://github.com/downloads/... to be done with it.  GHC itself now is misspelling since they dropped the "cloud" prefix.  Even when it was meaningful, it was still confusing to have usual GitHub-related knobs meaning something else in presence of MASTER_SITES=GHC.  It's hacky and confusing, asking for abuse and mistakes.
